title: Novel Solutions Toilet Brush with Holder – Round Lid and Strong Dense Bristles, Durable Stainless Steel Handle, Compact Design - White
features: Modern and practical design with Matt White coating Finish to match with the touch of bathroom style
Toilet brush head is made with sturdy and dense bristles that let you clean the toilet at 360° deeply and reach every part of it.
Stainless Steel handle with round lid to prevent your hands from the splashes during cleaning work
Tall and stable holder for holding the drips and avoid stains in your bathroom.
Product size: 10.0cm Diameter x 38.0cm Height. Ideal size for any modern bathroom and office washroom
description: From the manufacturer MAKE YOUR BATHROOM CLEANING A BREEZE AND ELEVATE YOUR BATHROOM WITH NOVEL SOLUTIONS TOILET BRUSH WITH HOLDER Classy & Modern Design The toilet brush is designed with smooth surfaces and minimalist details that contribute to a modern aesthetic. This design approach ensures that the brush seamlessly integrates into bathrooms with modern décor styles. The toilet brush comes with a specifically designed holder that allows for easy and space-saving storage. This holder is often compact and fits neatly beside or behind the toilet, ensuring it doesn't take up unnecessary space in the bathroom. The round lid acts as a barrier to prevent splashes and water from reaching the user's hands during cleaning. NOVEL SOLUTIONS MATT WHITE FINISH BATHROOM BRUSH WITH HOLDER Crafted with both functionality and style in mind, this set is designed to keep your bathroom sparkling clean while seamlessly blending into your décor. Featuring a durable handle and sturdy bristles, our toilet brush ensures efficient cleaning with every swipe. The brush head reaches all the nooks, leaving your toilet bowl spotless and germ-free. Say goodbye to stubborn stains and hello to a hygienic bathroom. The included holder provides a convenient storage solution, keeping the brush neatly tucked away when not in use. Its compact design fits seamlessly beside your toilet or discreetly in a corner, maintaining a clutter-free bathroom. It is built to withstand daily use, and its modern and minimalist look complements any bathroom décor. FEATURES Efficient Cleaning Powder Coated Steel Construction Tall and Stable Holder Hygienic and Space-Saving Design Versatile Compatibility Long-lasting Performance Stainless Steel Handle with Round Lid Non-Slip Base THE BATHROOM BRUSH AND HOLDER’S DESIGN COMPLEMENT VARIOUS BATHROOM DECOR STYLES, ENHANCING THE VISUAL APPEAL OF THE SPACE Splash-Preventing Lid Stainless steel handle provides a sleek and modern look to the brush while ensuring long-lasting performance. The handle is often ergonomically designed to provide a comfortable and secure grip during use. This allows for effective cleaning without causing strain or discomfort to the user's hands. The round lid acts as a barrier between the user's hands and any water or cleaning solution splashes that may occur during the cleaning process. The lid helps to intercept these splashes, preventing them from reaching the user's hands and causing discomfort or mess. The bristles of the brush are designed to be robust. They are firmly attached to the brush head to prevent shedding or deformation, even when scrubbing tough stains or hard-to-reach areas. It let you clean the toilet at 360° deeply and reach every part of it. KEEP YOUR BATHROOM SPOTLESS AND HYGIENIC WITH OUR BRUSH HOLDER, DESIGNED TO PREVENT THE SPREAD OF GERMS AND BACTERIA Effective Cleansing Ideal for households, offices, hotels, cafes and other commercial spaces also, It can be used in a wide range of commercial spaces, including schools, gyms, airports, and public facilities. The tall design of the holder ensures that it provides sufficient coverage to contain any drips or excess water from the toilet brush. This prevents the liquid from splashing onto the bathroom floor or surrounding surfaces and reduces the risk of stains and water damage.
